method: SkillOpt-adapted rollout -> judge -> validation-gate (citation tier, wave A)
held_out_queries: Does the PMLA word count include the Works Cited list?
What counts / doesn't count toward the limit — notes, works cited, translations?

edits.summary: Add the verified word-count inclusion rule the skill omitted: the 6,000-9,000-word count includes discursive notes but EXCLUDES the list of works cited and translations (so a Works Cited list never eats the budget). Exact cap kept as live-check.
edits.grounded_in: official-source-map.md (verified quote: 'count including discursive notes but excluding the list of works cited and translations')
